validation_command: python -c "import subprocess,pathlib,json; v=subprocess.run(['python','scripts/run/hb_cli.py','version'],capture_output=True,text=True,encoding='utf-8').stdout.strip(); assert 'v1.1.0' in v,f'FAIL version={v}'; hb=pathlib.Path('scripts/run/hb_cli.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'TRIPLE_RUN_COUNT' in hb,'FAIL TRIPLE_RUN_COUNT'; assert 'triple_consistency' in hb,'FAIL triple_consistency'; assert 'FLAKY_OUTPUT' in hb,'FAIL FLAKY_OUTPUT'; assert 'E_TRIVIAL_CMD' in hb,'FAIL E_TRIVIAL_CMD'; assert 'is_trivial_command' in hb,'FAIL is_trivial_command'; p=pathlib.Path('docs/_canon/planos/TEMP_TRIVIAL_TEST.json'); p.write_text(json.dumps({'project':'HB Track','version':'1.1.0','tasks':[{'id':'999','title':'T','description':'test trivial gate behavioral check minimum length required','criteria':'E_TRIVIAL_CMD raised','validation_command':'echo OK','evidence_file':'docs/hbtrack/evidence/AR_999_t.log','ssot_touches':[]}]}),encoding='utf-8'); r=subprocess.run(['python','scripts/run/hb_cli.py','plan',str(p),'--dry-run'],capture_output=True,text=True,encoding='utf-8'); p.unlink(missing_ok=True); assert r.returncode!=0,f'FAIL trivial not rejected exit={r.returncode}'; assert 'E_TRIVIAL_CMD' in r.stderr or 'trivial' in r.stderr.lower(),f'FAIL wrong error:{r.stderr[:100]}'; print('PASS: v1.1.0+triple-run+anti-trivial OK')"
